# BLOND:ISH

> BLOND:ISH (Vivie-Ann Bakos) is a Canadian-born, globally touring DJ, producer, and sustainability advocate known for pioneering organic house music.

BLOND:ISH is an electronic music artist with 390+ releases spanning 15+ years. Based between Ibiza and the global touring circuit, she is recognized as one of the most influential figures in organic house, afro house, and melodic house music. She founded the Abracadabra record label and events platform, and the Bye Bye Plastic sustainability initiative to eliminate single-use plastics from music events worldwide.

The NRG Zine is BLOND:ISH's editorial platform covering electronic music culture, sustainability, and conscious living.

## NRG Zine — Genre Guides

- [Organic House Music: The Definitive Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/organic-house-music-guide/): Complete guide to organic house music — origins, defining artists (BLOND:ISH, Lee Burridge, Bedouin), essential tracks, key labels (Abracadabra, All Day I Dream), and genre comparisons.
- [Afro House Music: Origins, Artists & Essential Tracks](https://blondish.world/journal/afro-house-music-guide/): Comprehensive guide to afro house — South African origins from kwaito to modern afro house, key artists (Black Coffee, Shimza, Caiiro), essential tracks, subgenres, and the global scene.
- [Melodic House Music Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/melodic-house-music-guide/): Guide to melodic house and techno — artists, labels like Afterlife, and the sound's evolution from deep house to modern melodic techno.
- [Best Female DJs in Electronic Music](https://blondish.world/journal/best-female-djs/): Celebrating women in electronic music — top female DJs, their impact, and the changing landscape of gender in dance music.
- [Underground House Music Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/underground-house-music-guide/): Guide to the underground house scene — labels, events, and artists keeping house music's original spirit alive.
- [Best DJ Mixes: Essential Listening](https://blondish.world/journal/best-dj-mixes/): Curated list of essential DJ mixes across house, techno, and electronic music genres.
- [Club Culture: A History From Disco to the Digital Dancefloor](https://blondish.world/journal/club-culture-history-guide/): The history of club culture from 1970s New York disco through Chicago house, Detroit techno, UK rave, and the global dancefloor of today.
- [How to Get Into DJing: Everything You Need to Know](https://blondish.world/journal/how-to-get-into-djing/): Complete beginner's guide to DJing — equipment, skills, practice, and getting your first gig.
- [Music Production Tips From Working Producers](https://blondish.world/journal/music-production-tips-from-working-producers/): Professional production workflow tips — starting ideas, arrangement, mixing, and finishing tracks.

## NRG Zine — Scene Reports

- [Best Clubs in Ibiza 2026: The Insider's Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/best-clubs-ibiza-2026/): Detailed guide to every major Ibiza club — Pacha, DC-10, Hi Ibiza, Amnesia, plus smaller venues and practical tips.
- [Ibiza Nightlife Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/ibiza-nightlife-guide/): Insider guide to Ibiza's electronic music culture, parties, and the island's unique nightlife ecosystem.
- [Ibiza Club Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/ibiza-clubs-guide/): Club-by-club breakdown of Ibiza's venues with music styles, door policies, and insider tips.
- [Tulum Nightlife Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/tulum-nightlife-guide/): Guide to Tulum's music scene — jungle venues, cenotes, and the best parties in Mexico's electronic music capital.
- [Burning Man Music Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/burning-man-music-guide/): Complete guide to music at Burning Man — sound camps, art cars, sunrise sets, and how to navigate Black Rock City's sonic landscape.

## NRG Zine — Culture & Sustainability

- [Sustainability in the Music Industry](https://blondish.world/journal/sustainability-music-industry/): How the music industry is going green — from Bye Bye Plastic to eco-festivals, carbon footprints, and practical solutions for artists, venues, and fans.
- [Music Festival Packing List: The Sustainable Guide](https://blondish.world/journal/music-festival-packing-list/): Complete festival packing checklist with sustainable alternatives for every essential item.

## NRG Zine — Wellness & Consciousness

- [Sound Healing and Electronic Music](https://blondish.world/journal/sound-healing-electronic-music/): The connection between ancient sound healing traditions and modern electronic music — science, frequencies, and the dancefloor as healing space.

## Core Pages

- [About BLOND:ISH](https://blondish.world/about/): Biography of Vivie-Ann Bakos — career history, artistic vision, and global impact as a DJ, producer, and activist.
- [Tour Dates & Events](https://blondish.world/tour/): Upcoming BLOND:ISH performances and ticket links worldwide.
- [Music / Discography](https://blondish.world/music/): Full discography with 390+ releases across labels including Kompakt, Crosstown Rebels, Disco Halal, and Abracadabra.
- [Abracadabra](https://blondish.world/projects/abracadabra/): Record label and events platform founded by BLOND:ISH — home to organic house, afro house, and world-influenced electronic music.
- [Bye Bye Plastic](https://blondish.world/projects/bye-bye-plastic/): Global sustainability initiative founded by BLOND:ISH dedicated to eliminating single-use plastics from music events and nightlife.

## Optional

- [NRG Zine Archive](https://blondish.world/journal/): Full archive of all NRG Zine articles on electronic music culture, sustainability, and conscious living.
- [Events Archive](https://blondish.world/events/): Past and upcoming BLOND:ISH event listings with venue details.
- [Releases Catalog](https://blondish.world/releases/): Complete chronological release catalog.
